title: What anime manga would they be into
display_title: What anime manga would they be into
wikitext:
[]: What anime/manga would they be into?             Quote Post by NemZ » Thu Sep 18, 2008 8:56 pm Just what it says... like the music thread, but anime/manga based instead. Can be random shout outs or even more in-depth if you want. For example, Kensuke is a born Gundam otaku, no question whatsoever. Could Gendo be a secret Go Nagi (both Giant Robo and Devilman) fan? What would Rei think of Metropolis? (I'm especially curious how she would compare both Kenichi and Rock to Shinji.) Well, you get the point. Wild and pointless speculation is GO!

[]:             Quote Post by LeoXiao » Thu Sep 18, 2008 9:10 pm Shinji would watch Asuka hentai, and jerk off to it.

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Thu Sep 18, 2008 11:02 pm Why, their show, of course. And Shin Chan, of course.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Thu Sep 18, 2008 11:11 pm Geez... do I really have to say "...besides eva or works based on it?" I expected better, people.

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Thu Sep 18, 2008 11:51 pm I said something different. Ok: Gendo: closet Sailor Moon fan Rei: Stuff like GitS, and other cyberpunk stuff that is deep. Asuka: Shin Chan, DragonBall, maybe Tenchi Muyo, other romantic drama/action/slice of life stuff Shinji:Slice of Life stuff, so that he can try to apply it to his life. Shows that offer "service"....... hentai....... Toji: action, action, action. Probably Gurren Lagann. Kensuke: Gundam for sho, Gurren Lagann, maybe Full Metal Panic for the military stuff, other military based anime Hikari: Sort of like Toji and Asuka mix hentai Misato: Same as Asuka Ritsuko: Too many to name all at once, she watches a lot with her cats. That's all I got for now.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Sep 19, 2008 1:08 am Of course you have to assume that 2I doesn't effect manga/anime production -- except possibly delay things by 7 years. Though I'm sure Bleach, Naruto and One Piece will still be running in 2015 I can imagine Fuyutsuki having the occasional ronery jag with Twilight Romance titles, while being a secret reader of Mohiro Kitoh. Shinji would probably want to watch Strike Witches , but wouldn't dare when Asuka is around.

[]:             Quote Post by Zaiku » Fri Sep 19, 2008 3:34 am I'm not sure about specific animes, but I have ideas for genres. Shinji: Hentai Kensuke: Mecha Asuka: Romantic comedy Rei: Rei doing something that is a luxury? NO CHANCE! Toji: Action Kaworu: Yaoi [/badjoke] Gendo: Lolicon [/worsejoke]

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Sep 19, 2008 7:53 am Shinji's too prudish about sex -- he'd probably watch just fan-service and ecchi and feel bad about doing so, and worse for fapping after. Kensuke would probably feel that mecha-musume was the best genre ever, combining two interests into one.

[]:             Quote Post by Zaiku » Fri Sep 19, 2008 3:49 pm I forgot about Aoba, I'd see his favourite anime is Beck:Mongolian Chop Squad.

[]:             Quote Post by Lucretius » Fri Sep 19, 2008 3:51 pm Gendou: Death Note

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Fri Sep 19, 2008 4:11 pm Action_Bastard wrote: Toji: action, action, action.

[]:             Quote Post by Zaiku » Fri Sep 19, 2008 7:39 pm Maybe a combination of both, he seems to be the kind of guy who could appreciate both.

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Fri Sep 19, 2008 8:40 pm Asuka: Romantic comedy

[]:             Quote Post by Lucretius » Fri Sep 19, 2008 8:52 pm Defectron wrote: Asuka: Romantic comedy

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Fri Sep 19, 2008 9:31 pm Aoba > Black Heaven! Toji > Any of the millions of sports-themed drama/action anime titles. Kaworu > Angel Sanctuary? Mwahahaha!

[]:             Quote Post by Zaiku » Fri Sep 19, 2008 10:48 pm Hyuuga: Anything, you actually see him reading manga in his free time.

[]:             Quote Post by CorporalChaos » Fri Sep 19, 2008 11:51 pm Asuka: probably action stuff, most of which would be fairly realistic. Rei: my guess is some sort of dectective/mystery stuff Touji: sports/ecchi Kensuke: ecchi/hentai or hentai/ecchi Shinji: probably comedy, or, Sadamoto's Evangelion

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Sat Sep 20, 2008 9:21 am Asuka and Kaworu: both would totally be into yaoi.

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Sat Sep 20, 2008 11:37 am Asuka and Kaworu: both would totally be into yaoi.

[]:             Quote Post by Zaiku » Mon Sep 22, 2008 1:37 am ^That's not the only thing that Kaworu is out of the closet about... WOOP! >_> Also, I don't know why, but I have a feeling that Kaji likes to watch Initial D and Cowboy Bebop.
